scenarios.title: CLI capabilities bootstrap
scenarios.description: CLI JSON bootstrap exposes capabilities, documentation routing, and operation metadata.

checks.message: expected registry digest with descriptor/documentation hashes
expected canonicalTools map for canonical-first discovery
expected canonical bootstrap tools bootstrap, capabilities, schema, policy.list, profile.get, recipe.list, missing none
expected compatibility aliases to stay out of the top-level canonicalTools map by default
expected canonicalTools["arb.scan"] to stay canonical-only by default while advertising hidden compatibility aliases until explicitly requested

scenarios.title: Remote MCP scope denial
scenarios.description: Remote gateway hides tools outside the granted token scopes so out-of-scope callers cannot distinguish them from unknown tools.

checks.message: expected transport-level error for hidden out-of-scope tool
expected out-of-scope remote tool to avoid leaking missingScopes details
expected hidden out-of-scope remote tool to avoid leaking remediation details

scenarios.title: MCP execute-intent denial
scenarios.description: Mutating tools that require execute intent are denied before any runtime side effects.

checks.message: expected transport-level error for execute intent denial
expected remediation hints for execute intent denial
expected execute-intent denial before any operation state side effects

scenarios.title: MCP workspace path denial
scenarios.description: Workspace-constrained MCP tools reject file reads outside the workspace boundary.

checks.message: expected transport-level error for workspace path denial
expected recovery command for workspace path denial

scenarios.title: CLI operations empty-list bootstrap
scenarios.description: Fresh operation state exposes an empty operations list with stable envelope structure.

checks.message: expected empty operations list in isolated env

scenarios.title: CLI schema bootstrap
scenarios.description: CLI JSON schema bootstrap exposes the exhaustive agent-facing contract descriptor surface.

checks.message: expected BootstrapPayload to document canonicalTools, recommendedBootstrapFlow, and includedToolCommands arrays
expected bootstrap descriptor to advertise include-compatibility as the explicit alias opt-in
expected bootstrap descriptor to stay canonical and preferred
expected arb.scan descriptor to stay canonical and preferred
expected compatibility aliases to stay out of the default canonical schema surface

scenarios.title: Stdio MCP listTools bootstrap
scenarios.description: The generated local SDK can list normalized MCP tools with stable xPandora metadata.

checks.message: expected help tool in MCP tool list
expected bootstrap tool in MCP tool list
expected capabilities tool in MCP tool list
expected schema tool in MCP tool list
expected mirror.plan in MCP tool list
expected normalized xPandora metadata on listed tools
expected canonical arb.scan tool in MCP tool list
expected bootstrap to remain a canonical preferred tool in default MCP discovery
expected compatibility aliases to stay hidden from default MCP tool discovery
expected default MCP tool discovery to list only canonical/preferred tools, found compatibility aliases:

scenarios.description: CLI operations cancel transitions an executing seeded operation into canceled state.
